text_excerpt: News | Nigel Huddleston Skip to main content Main navigation Home About Me The Constituency News Contacts Digital ID Cards Get Involved & Volunteering Social Media Ban for Under-16s: Have Your Say News EFL Community Awards Friday, 17 April, 2026 It was a pleasure to attend the EFL Community Awards in Parliament, recognising the outstanding work carried out by clubs and their charitable organisations across the country. The impact of this work extends far beyond the pitch, supporting health, wellbeing and opportunities for over a million people each year. It was interesting to hear how clubs continue to act as trusted partners in their...
